category_sources: Official README describes it as an unofficial Todoist CLI client written in Go.
source_facts.description says todoist-cli-go is a CLI for Todoist.
display_name_sources: Official README heading says Todoist CLI client.
source_facts.name is todoist-cli-go, the Homebrew formula name used to distinguish it from Doist's official CLI.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and contains usage, config, install, token registration, sync, and completion sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/sachaos/todoist, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README says it is an unofficial Todoist CLI client written in Golang and lists CLI usage commands.
